description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and superman graphic on the frontFitRegular Wash careHand wash with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsIf you're a fan of comics, and especially superman, then this range of t-shirts is the perfect choice for you. The graphic transports you to your childhood dreams while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh all day. Pair this with jeans or shorts.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
